test.command: bun run ci:vitest && bun run ci:pytest

blockingIssues.description: Remote required-check evidence in tests/artifacts/confidence-gates-final-evidence.json is anchored to SHA aa5b826..., while the parity fix lives in commit 560ddbc..., so same-SHA proof for the revision containing the fix is incomplete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require remote required-check proof to be captured for the same pushed revision that contains the implementation fix, and codify an explicit retrieval sequence (identify pushed SHA -> wait for required checks -> capture check-run IDs/URLs for that SHA -> write evidence artifact).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for ci-playwright-remote-parity-fix failed due to evidence SHA mismatch (aa5b826... vs fix commit 560ddbc...). Additional reviewer observation from confidence-evidence-same-sha-checkrun-proof-fix shows repeated ad-hoc check-run exploration before converging on a valid proof workflow.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a validation-artifact convention for code-changing follow-up fixes: evidence artifact revision must match the commit/SHA under review, with immutable check-run links bound to that same SHA.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS guidance currently defines required gate layers but does not define strict SHA-binding convention for evidence artifacts, enabling mismatch between evidence revision and fix revision.
